page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.6xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The CPU configuration provides 24 vCPUs with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio and a 35 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. Network connectivity is defined by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The lack of local NVMe storage and dedicated hardware accelerators represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high-speed local caching or parallelized graphics processing.

Performance benchmarks place the ecs.hfg6.6xlarge consistently in the middle 50% tier. It achieves a single-core Geekbench score of 1287.0 and a multi-core score of 9875.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 23637.6. In memory-bound tasks, the instance delivers a read-only large block bandwidth of 109.43 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 48.03 GB/sec. For database operations, it processes 22.14 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 8647.45 on Passmark database tests. This profile offers moderate resource density and balanced compute-to-memory allocation, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that do not require specialized hardware.

The hardware and benchmark profile make this instance suitable for multi-threaded applications, static web serving, software compilation, and moderate database operations. It can also handle light language model inference, processing 34.44 tokens per second for prompt processing on a 7B parameter model, though it is not suited for larger models due to the absence of GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.6xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 24 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 3.1 GHz. It is configured with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, it delivers an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results place the instance in the middle tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 9875.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 23637.6. It demonstrates stable memory performance with a large-block read bandwidth of 109.43 GB/sec and handles 22.14 million Redis SET operations per second. This balanced resource allocation makes the instance suitable for software compilation, static web serving, multi-threaded applications, and moderate database workloads that rely on network-attached storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.6xlarge is a 24-core Intel Xeon 8269CY instance with 96 GB RAM and 8 Gbps network bandwidth. It offers balanced general-purpose performance for multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.6xlarge features 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 96 GB RAM, and KVM virtualization for balanced general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 24-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory allocation and baseline 8 Gbps networking for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores at 3.1 GHz
96.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suitable for software compilation, web serving, and moderate databases
